turns.content: What brings you in today?
My lower back. It's been killing me. I sit in the van all day and it just gets worse.
When did this start?
Dunno exactly. A few months, I guess. Just keeps getting worse.
Can you describe the pain or discomfort? Where exactly do you feel it?
Right in the lower part, here (points to lower back). It's a dull ache most times, but sometimes it shoots right down my leg. That part really gets me.
Have you had any fever or chills?
No. No fever or nothing like that. Just the back pain.
What medications are you currently taking?
Just some ibuprofen when it gets bad. Nothing else.
Do you have any chronic medical conditions?
Nah, nothing like that. Just my back.
Are you allergic to any medications?
Not that I know of. Never had a problem.
Have you tried anything to relieve the symptoms?
I just take the ibuprofen and sometimes use a heating pad. That's about it.
Does anything make it better or worse?
Lying down helps some. But sitting in that van makes it worse. Driving all day is the worst part.
How has this been affecting your daily life?
Makes it hard to work. I can't do my job right when I'm hurting like this. It's just getting in the way of everything.
Do you smoke or drink alcohol?
I don't smoke. I'll have a few beers sometimes, but not every day.
Has anyone in your family had similar problems?
Not that I know of. My folks never had nothing like this. Just me.
Have you experienced anything like this before?
No. Never had this before. It just started a few months back.
I've explained quite a bit — does that make sense so far?
Yeah, sure. Whatever you say, doc.
On a scale of 1 to 10, how would you rate what you're going through right now — physically, and also emotionally?
Physically, it's about a 4. Emotionally, I'm at a 3. It's got me worried.
Do you have any questions for me?
Nah, no questions. Just tell me what to do.
What do you think might be going on?
I dunno. I thought it was just from sitting too long. Maybe it's something like sciatica? But you're the doctor.
Is there anything else you think I should know?
Nah, that's it. Just the back and leg stuff I told you.
